prompt.goal: Shared local file storage under wwwroot/uploads with validation, optional ImageSharp resize, and delete helper.
prompt.hardRules: - NO Azure/S3; local wwwroot only - NO Controller/View changes required (optional later) - Register DI Scoped in Program.cs - Package SixLabors.ImageSharp only extra package
prompt.scope: - IFileStorageService + FileStorageService - SaveAsync(file, subFolder, allowedExt, maxBytes) → relative URL - SaveImageResizedAsync(..., width, height) - DeleteIfExistsAsync(relativeUrl)
